How it works

01
Download

Get the spreadsheet instantly. Open it in Excel, Google Sheets, or Numbers.

02
Fill the blue cells

Type your numbers in the blue cells. Black cells are calculated for you — never touch them.

03
Watch it update

Your dashboard updates live. Spend 5 minutes on payday and stay in control.

Questions

Do I need Excel?

No. Every tracker works in Microsoft Excel, free Google Sheets, and Apple Numbers. Use whatever you already have.

Is this a subscription?

Never. You pay once and the file is yours forever — including free updates.

Will it connect to my bank?

No, and that's the point. Nothing logs into your accounts. Your numbers stay 100% private on your device.

I'm not good with spreadsheets.

That's exactly who these are for. You only ever type into the blue cells — everything else does itself. Each tracker has a "Start Here" tab.
